title: Hardcore Heart Totem
description: This pack changes the texture of the Totem of Undying to an Minecraft hardcore Heart
body:
# ❤️ Heart Totem
## "Keep your heart in your hand."

Tired of the bulky golden villager statue taking up your screen? Heart Totem is a simple, lightweight resource pack that replaces the standard Totem of Undying with a vibrant, iconic Minecraft heart.

## ✨ Features
Clean Design: Replaces the totem sprite with a high-quality heart icon that fits perfectly with the vanilla UI.

Better Visibility: The heart model is sleeker and less intrusive in your off-hand.

Thematic Consistency: Makes "extra lives" feel more intuitive—you're literally holding onto your life!

## 🛠️ Installation
1. Download the .zip file.

2. Drop it into your resourcepacks folder.

3. Activate it in-game under Options > Resource Packs.
